violations.text: Food items repackaged in the food establishment are lacking complete information on labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of all ingredients (Including any sub-ingredients) and allergens, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Per the PIC, sub-ingredients are to be added. Owner began correcting labels at time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/04/2026
The ceiling in the front prep area is covered with tiles that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. New Violation. Correct By: 12/09/2023
